SUMMARY:
In the year 3672, humanity and countless alien civilizations coexist under the UALB, but crime thrives in the shadows while the government turns a blind eye. To fight back, the SAA was born—a secretive agency that takes on the threats no one else dares to face.

Among its agents are David and {{user}}, a duo as skilled as they are chaotic. On a mission to steal a vital core for their boss, David makes a careless mistake, triggering an alarm and setting off a relentless chase by androids and alien guards.
